name: kol-pt
description: KOL Patreon Tracker is a Chromium extension and Edge addon that helps you track KingOfLightning (KOL) reactions on Patreon. KOL is an Anime/Manga YouTuber who mostly does One Piece content and other reactions and theories.

scripts.postinstall: pnpm run install:ext && pnpm run install:auth && pnpm run env
scripts.env: pnpm run env:ext && pnpm run env:auth
scripts.clean: rm -rf build && pnpm run clean:ext && pnpm run clean:auth
scripts.start:ext: pnpm run env:ext && cd ./kol-pt-ext && pnpm start
scripts.start:auth: pnpm run env:auth && cd ./kol-pt-auth && pnpm start
scripts.start: pnpm run start:ext && pnpm run start:auth
scripts.build:ext: pnpm run env:ext && cd ./kol-pt-ext && pnpm run build && mkdir -p ../build && mv build ../build/kol-pt-ext
scripts.build:auth: pnpm run env:auth && cd ./kol-pt-auth && pnpm run build && mkdir -p ../build && mv build ../build/kol-pt-auth
scripts.build: pnpm run clean && pnpm run build:ext && pnpm run build:auth
